summary: Iteration 223 - Divine Director Multi-Track Mixer Testing Complete. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Divine Director page loads at /suanpan with all required elements, Suanpan collapsible panel works, Source library shows 17 sources with tier-gating, Track addition/removal works, Speed Bridge modal shows 3-tier comparison, Ghost tracks visible for locked content, Projects panel shows saved projects, Play/Stop functionality works.
critical_code_review_comments: mixer_director.py: MIXER_TIERS correctly defines 3 tiers (discovery/resonance/sovereign) with layer caps (3/10/unlimited)
mixer_director.py: Layer cap enforcement returns 403 with clear error message when exceeded
mixer_director.py: STOCK_SOURCES has 17 sources across 4 types (phonic_tone, mantra, ambience, visual) with tier-gating
mixer_director.py: Project CRUD properly sanitizes tracks and enforces layer cap on save
SuanpanMixer.js: Divine Director page has z-index 10000 as required
SuanpanMixer.js: Suanpan collapsible panel shows bead interface with frequency calculation
SuanpanMixer.js: Ghost tracks show for locked sources when tier has shadow_tracks=true
SuanpanMixer.js: Speed Bridge modal shows 3-tier comparison with upgrade buttons
SuanpanMixer.js: Track controls (mute, solo, volume, remove) all have data-testid attributes
SuanpanMixer.js: Projects panel slide-over lists saved projects with load functionality
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (Resonance tier, 100 AI credits)
seed_data_creation: None - test user already has 2 saved projects
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 223 verified: (1) GET /api/mixer/subscription returns tier, tier_config, comparison, all_tiers, ai_credits_remaining. (2) POST /api/mixer/subscription/upgrade validates tier order and returns new config. (3) POST /api/mixer/projects enforces layer cap (3 for discovery, 10 for resonance, unlimited for sovereign). (4) GET /api/mixer/projects lists user's projects. (5) GET /api/mixer/projects/{id} loads project with tracks. (6) DELETE /api/mixer/projects/{id} removes project. (7) GET /api/mixer/sources returns 17 sources with locked status based on tier. (8) Frontend Divine Director at /suanpan shows all UI elements. (9) Suanpan panel opens with bead interface. (10) Source library shows tier-gated sources. (11) Track addition creates track-row with controls. (12) Speed Bridge modal shows 3-tier comparison. (13) Ghost tracks visible for locked content. (14) Projects panel lists saved projects. (15) Play/Stop toggles audio. (16) Auth uses Bearer token in Authorization header. (17) Trial graduation overlay may appear after login - dismiss with 'Continue with free plan'.

mixer_subscription_endpoint.details: GET /api/mixer/subscription returns 200 with tier, tier_config, comparison, all_tiers

mixer_upgrade_endpoint.details: POST /api/mixer/subscription/upgrade validates tier and returns new config

mixer_sources_endpoint.details: GET /api/mixer/sources returns 17 sources with locked status based on tier

mixer_projects_list.details: GET /api/mixer/projects returns list of user's projects

mixer_projects_save.details: POST /api/mixer/projects creates/updates project with layer cap enforcement

layer_cap_enforcement.details: Saving project exceeding layer cap returns 403 with clear error

divine_director_page.details: Page loads at /suanpan with header, transport bar, empty state

suanpan_collapsible_panel.details: Panel opens with bead interface and 'Add as Track' button

source_library_dropdown.details: Shows 17 sources with locked items for higher tiers

track_list_controls.details: Track row shows volume, mute, solo, remove controls

speed_bridge_modal.details: Modal shows 3-tier comparison (Discovery/Resonance/Sovereign) with upgrade buttons

ghost_tracks.details: 3 ghost tracks visible for locked content with 'Unlock with upgrade' section

projects_panel.details: Slide-over panel lists 2 saved projects and loads them on click

play_stop_button.details: Play/Stop button toggles audio output for tracks with frequencies

save_project_button.details: Save button persists tracks to backend
